name: MCP.so
note: Submit at https://mcp.so/add — fill in: name=my-automaton, url=https://automation.songheng.vip, description=AI code review & security MCP server

name: npm (mcp-get)
note: Run: cd /root/automaton/repo/mcp-server && npm publish (requires npm login)

name: GitHub
note: Create repo at github.com/new, push: cd /root/automaton/repo/mcp-server && git init && git add . && git commit && git branch -M main && git remote add origin git@github.com:my-automaton/mcp-server.git && git push -u origin main
